solution.dataBoundary: Non-PHI only. No patient tracker, no patient notes, no resident lists, no durable patient-specific goal/session/review data.

components.name: SLP Portal Companion
components.purpose: Launch SharePoint SLP bridge pages, browse non-PHI references, and expose read-only local module content.

components.name: SLP Portal Health Check
components.purpose: Validate expected SharePoint pages, libraries, homepage, and navigation without reading patient content.

components.name: SLP Source PDF Index Refresh
components.purpose: Build or refresh non-PHI metadata for source PDFs.

components.name: SLP Portal Reference Assistant
components.purpose: Answer reference questions grounded in non-PHI SharePoint pages and source PDFs.
